missions.name: Sealed Reliquary
missions.description: A sealed vault door groans open. Secure the reliquary-core before the Halo purges its memory.

missions.name: Echoes of the Archivum
missions.description: Broken cogitators whisper in dead tongues. Complete a data-rite at the central node.

missions.name: Ashstorm Ambush
missions.description: Toxic winds erase silhouettes. Strike fast—every second the storm learns your name.

missions.name: Scavenger’s Claim
missions.description: A half-buried cache surfaces in the grit. Hold it long enough to strip it bare.

missions.name: Crown Signal
missions.description: A broadcast pings through the Halo like a heartbeat. Claim the spire and decode its intent.

missions.name: Spire Stair Massacre
missions.description: Narrow platforms. Long falls. One leader must not leave the stairs alive.

missions.name: Machine-Spirit Rebellion
missions.description: Ancient servitors awaken hostile to all. Bend them, break them, or die beneath their tools.

missions.name: Forgewater Extraction
missions.description: Boiling coolant floods the halls. Extract the canisters before they rupture.

missions.name: Reality Fracture Node
missions.description: A crack in realspace pulses. Perform the rite—or disrupt it—while the world forgets its edges.

missions.name: Null-Tide Surge
missions.description: A null wave approaches. Hold the node at the moment the warp goes silent.

missions.name: Black Glass Siege
missions.description: Shards of obsidian cut armour seals. Destroy the hardpoint or bleed out by inches.

missions.name: Mirrorfire Crossings
missions.description: Laser reflections dance across black glass. Every move is a confession.

missions.name: Intercept Transmission
missions.description: The crater amplifies every whisper. Complete two intercepts before the enemy decrypts you.

missions.name: Broadcast of Lies
missions.description: Plant a false transmission: let them chase ghosts while you take the ground.

missions.name: Silent Predators
missions.description: The trees watch. The ground listens. Survive with your commander intact.

missions.name: Sporepath Hunt
missions.description: Trail spores lead to a marked prey. One leader is being culled—decide whose.

missions.name: Vaultbreaker Run
missions.description: Alarm runes ignite. Get in, seize the shard, and escape before the Halo locks the doors.

missions.name: Ashline Convoy
missions.description: A supply crawler limps through ash dunes. Escort it—or strip it to the bones.

missions.name: Spire Resonance
missions.description: The spire begins to sing. Tune it to your will and the Halo will remember your name.

missions.name: Forge-Heart Overload
missions.description: Overload the forge-heart. It will not forgive you, but it might obey.

missions.name: Warp Scar Coronation
missions.description: A throne-shaped absence forms in the air. Complete the rite to seat a ‘king’.

missions.name: Obsidian Monolith Wake
missions.description: A monolith stirs beneath the glass. Hold the site until it rises—or until you break.

missions.name: Craterwide Jam
missions.description: Blind the Halo. Jam every band. In the silence, something else will speak.

missions.name: Forest of Borrowed Faces
missions.description: The forest imitates voices. Recover a ‘face’ from the undergrowth before it learns yours.
